economic_notes: BCN holds 51% share in BCN/Arnason Industries Ltd. Joint Venture for construction projects. Super B's Convenience Store is a band-owned entity accounted for by modified equity method. Large new school construction project (MSI - New School) in progress at $56.9M.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 statements were signed by auditor on October 20, 2023 — over two years after year-end, indicating significant reporting delay. Large construction in progress balance of $73.96M primarily driven by MSI New School project ($56.9M). First Nation Bank demand loan of $9.09M at prime plus 2% was originally due May 2020, suggesting it was in default or extended. Super B's Convenience Store had a negative investment balance in 2020 (-$243,792) resolved to $0 in 2021. No schedule of remuneration provided. Care Home (George Colon Memorial Home Inc.) is a consolidated subsidiary. Segment 'Own Source Programs' includes $4,153,370 in other revenue with no government transfers.
warnings: High ISC dependency (81.65%) — operations heavily reliant on federal transfers
